whisky-peak-zoro-vs-bounty-hunters.note: Local night-town theatre anchored to the existing Whisky Peak point.

robin-miss-all-sunday-arrival.note: The Going Merry deck just after departing Whisky Peak; the atlas point is only a local theatre anchor.

ace-blocks-smoker-at-nanohana.note: Nanohana restaurant-street pursuit anchored to the existing port-city point.

ace-fire-fist-destroys-billions-fleet.note: The chapter-159 convoy clash occurs after leaving Nanohana; the existing port-city point is a local theatre anchor, not a measured river coordinate.

arabasta-luffy-vs-crocodile-round-one.note: The desert outskirts beyond Rainbase are staged at the existing Rainbase point; this replaces the earlier faceless Crocodile blockout.

arabasta-sanji-vs-bon-clay.note: Sanji and Bon Clay's chapter-187 to 189 duel is staged at the existing Alubarna point.

arabasta-zoro-vs-mr-one.note: Zoro and Daz Bones' chapter-194 to 195 duel shares the Alubarna theatre and supersedes Nami/Miss Doublefinger when its corrected gate opens.

arabasta-nami-vs-miss-doublefinger.note: Nami's chapter-190 to 193 first Clima-Tact duel is staged at Alubarna and replaces Sanji/Bon Clay at the shared theatre.

arabasta-luffy-vs-crocodile-round-two.note: The chapter-198 to 201 palace fight uses the existing Alubarna point as a local rooftop theatre and keeps the water-counter state separate from rounds one and three.

arabasta-luffy-vs-crocodile-final.note: The underground royal-tomb final uses the existing Alubarna point as its local theatre and replaces round two when chapter 203 opens.
